name: U Acknowledge Notary, LLC
description_short: Mobile and remote notary public in Pittsburgh, PA offering loan signings, apostilles, I-9 verification, fingerprinting, and remote online notarization via BlueNotary.
description_long:
U Acknowledge Notary, LLC is a Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania notary public business operated by Kinyhatta Reed, located at 2403 Sidney St in Allegheny County. The company holds Pennsylvania Notary Commission #1204086 issued by the Pennsylvania Department of State and is registered on the BlueNotary platform for remote online notarizations. A BBB profile exists under the Erie, PA chapter, though the specific letter grade and accreditation status were not surfaced in public records. Prospective clients should note that BBB data lists the commission expiration as 9/14/2024 — whether this has since been renewed is unverified and should be confirmed via the Pennsylvania Notary Search before engaging services.

The company offers a substantially broader range of document and compliance services than a typical notary-only operation. Core offerings include mobile notary visits (the notary travels to the client), remote online notarization via BlueNotary, apostille processing for internationally destined documents, and loan signing services covering real estate closings and reverse mortgages. Beyond standard notarization, the service menu extends to I-9 employment eligibility verification, fingerprinting, PennDOT vehicle title assistance, DOT and non-DOT urine specimen collection, immigration document assistance, exam proctoring, surplus claim recovery, nursing home and hospital notary support, and Power of Attorney and Last Will and Testament notarization. The website also lists life insurance consultation and financial planning or legacy and wealth-building as service areas, though these appear ancillary rather than primary offerings.

The company's clearest differentiator is scheduling flexibility: evenings, weekends, and mobile visits to nursing homes, hospitals, and homebound individuals are all available. Integration with BlueNotary enables fully remote notarizations for clients who cannot meet in person, which extends the effective service area beyond Pittsburgh proper. Customer satisfaction is visibly strong — 68 Google reviews average a 5.0 rating, an unusually high score for a local service business. The breadth of compliance services (fingerprinting, DOT drug testing, PennDOT titles) positions U Acknowledge Notary closer to a one-stop document and compliance shop than a narrow notary practice.

For Pittsburgh-area residents and businesses needing mobile or remote notarization, loan signings, apostilles, or compliance services such as I-9 and fingerprinting, U Acknowledge Notary appears to be a well-reviewed local option. The principal caveat is the unresolved license expiration question — confirm active licensure before scheduling. Pricing is not publicly listed; Pennsylvania law caps per-act notary fees, but travel and administrative charges may apply and require a direct quote. Critically, this is a service business, not a financial institution — it does not offer loans, credit repair, debt settlement, or any form of consumer lending.
pros: 5.0 Google rating across 68 reviews — exceptionally high satisfaction score for a local service business
Mobile notary travels to client locations including nursing homes, hospitals, and private residences
Remote Online Notary (RON) capability via BlueNotary eliminates need for in-person appointments
Service breadth extends well beyond notarization: fingerprinting, DOT drug testing, PennDOT titles, I-9 verification
Flexible scheduling includes evenings and weekends — useful for clients with standard business-hour conflicts
Apostille services available for documents requiring international authentication
Loan signing experience covers real estate closings and reverse mortgages for title companies and mortgage lenders
cons: PA Notary Commission #1204086 listed as expired 9/14/2024 per BBB records — renewal status as of 2026 is unverified
No public pricing on website — fee schedule requires direct contact for a quote
BBB profile exists but letter grade and accreditation status are unverified in public records
Geographic coverage limited to Pittsburgh metro and surrounding Pennsylvania counties
Not a financial institution — provides no loans, credit counseling, debt management, or credit-related services
best_for: Pittsburgh-area individuals needing mobile or remote notarization for wills, powers of attorney, or legal documents
Real estate agents, title agencies, and mortgage companies requiring loan signing services
Employers and HR departments needing I-9 employment eligibility verification or fingerprinting
Individuals seeking apostilles for documents intended for international use
diagnosis: U Acknowledge Notary, LLC is best suited for Pittsburgh-area residents and businesses needing a flexible, mobile, or remote notary with a broad compliance service menu — particularly for loan signings, apostilles, I-9s, and fingerprinting. The main caveat is the unresolved licensure question: BBB records show Commission #1204086 expired September 2024, and clients should verify active status via the Pennsylvania Notary Search before scheduling. This company is a document services provider, not a financial institution, and is miscategorized in any credit or lending-oriented directory context.
services: Mobile Notary (in-person, notary travels to client)
Remote Online Notary (RON) via BlueNotary platform
Loan signing services (real estate closings, reverse mortgages)
DOT and non-DOT urine specimen collection
